query:
INSERT INTO projects (name, description, status, clientId, createdById, createdByRole, confirmedCnaes, currentStep, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  'TESTE - Aprofundamento Questionário',
  'Projeto de teste para validar features de aprofundamento ilimitado',
  'assessment_fase1',
  clientId,
  createdById,
  createdByRole,
  '[{"code":"4637-1/01","description":"Comércio atacadista de cereais e leguminosas","relevance":"alta"}]',
  2,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM projects WHERE id = 90003 LIMIT 1;

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as new_project_id;
